title: Stenophragma suecicum
intro: Unfortunately, I could not verify any information about the plant Stenophragma suecicum.
taxonomy: Stenophragma suecicum is a genus of extinct conical-shelled brachiopods. It belongs to the phylum Brachiopoda and is classified within the class Strophomenata. The Strophomenata class is further divided into several orders, including the Productida order to which Stenophragma suecicum is assigned. Within the Productida order, Stenophragma suecicum is classified as a member of the productid brachiopods. The classification of Stenophragma suecicum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the brachiopod phylum.
